info.title: API Shop Documentation
info.description: Integrated API platform documentation. This document covers all services provided by API Shop. For details on common response codes (like 401, 403, 500), please refer to our unified error code documentation.

get.description: Get webpage crawl data, including returns full raw Rendered HTML content, fast and cost-efficient, and optimized for static page crawling, for scraping, metadata extraction, and page structure analysis.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The full URL of the webpage to crawl (e.g., 'https://www.example.com').

401.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing

403.description: Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded

500.description: Internal server error or upstream service exception

get.description: Get webpage crawl data, including removing boilerplate, for readable extraction, documentation workflows, and LLM input.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The full URL of the webpage to crawl and convert to Markdown (e.g., 'https://www.example.com').

401.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing

403.description: Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded

500.description: Internal server error or upstream service exception

get.description: Get webpage crawl data, including returns full raw HTML content, fast and cost-efficient, and optimized for static page crawling, for scraping, metadata extraction, and page structure analysis.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The full URL of the webpage to crawl (e.g., 'https://www.example.com').

401.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing

403.description: Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded

500.description: Internal server error or upstream service exception

get.description: Get Google video Search data, including titles, sources, and dates, for video SEO and content monitoring.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query for Google Videos (e.g., 'coding tutorial', 'movie trailers').

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The results page number. Use 0 for the first page, 1 for the second, and so on.

parameters.name: html
parameters.description: Set to true to return the raw HTML of the Google search results page alongside the structured data.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The Google domain to use for the search (e.g., 'google.com', 'google.co.uk'). See Google Domains.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

parameters.name: lr
parameters.description: Restrict results to one or more languages using the 'lang_{language_code}' format (e.g., 'lang_en'). See Google LR Language.

parameters.name: uule
parameters.description: Encoded location string (UULE) used to precisely localize Google search results. This is an advanced/technical parameter — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty and omit it.

parameters.name: tbs
parameters.description: Advanced search filter parameter (tbs) used to apply Google result filters (e.g. time range). This is an advanced parameter — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty.

parameters.name: safe
parameters.description: SafeSearch filter setting. Set to 'active' to filter adult content, or 'off' to disable it.

parameters.name: nfpr
parameters.description: Controls Google's auto-correction. Set to '1' to exclude corrected results, '0' to include them.

parameters.name: result_time
parameters.description: Filter results by publication time (e.g., 'qdr:d' for past 24 hours, 'qdr:w' for past week).

401.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing

403.description: Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded

500.description: Internal server error or upstream service exception

get.description: Get Google trends Trending Now data, including latest trending topics, region and time-window filters, and volume indicators, for breaking-trend monitoring and editorial planning.

parameters.name: geo
parameters.description: The geographic location code to retrieve real-time trends for (e.g., 'US' for United States). Default is 'US'.

parameters.name: hours
parameters.description: Time window for trending topics. Supported values: '4' (past 4 hours), '24' (past 24 hours), '48' (past 48 hours), '168' (past 7 days).

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en').

401.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing

403.description: Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded

500.description: Internal server error or upstream service exception

get.description: Get Google trends Search data, including interest over time, geo breakdowns, and related queries, for demand analysis and seasonal trend monitoring.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search term or topic ID to analyze in Google Trends (e.g., 'iPhone', '/m/027lnzs' for Bitcoin). You can provide up to 5 terms separated by commas for comparisons.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

parameters.name: geo
parameters.description: The geographic location code to filter trends (e.g., 'US', 'GB'). Omit for worldwide trends. See Google Trends Locations.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Refines results for region charts. Supported values: 'COUNTRY', 'REGION', 'DMA', 'CITY'.

parameters.name: data_type
parameters.description: The type of trend data to retrieve. Supported values: 'TIMESERIES' (Interest over time), 'GEO_MAP' (Breakdown by region).

parameters.name: tz
parameters.description: Time zone offset in minutes (e.g., '420' for PDT). Range: -1439 to 1439.

parameters.name: cat
parameters.description: The search category code (e.g., '0' for all categories).

parameters.name: gprop
parameters.description: The Google property to filter trends. Supported values: 'images', 'news', 'froogle' (Shopping), 'youtube'.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date range filter for the search. Supports predefined values (now 1-H, now 4-H, now 1-d, now 7-d, today 1-m, today 3-m, today 12-m, today 5-y, all) and custom ranges: yyyy-mm-dd yyyy-mm-dd (e.g. 2021-10-15 2022-05-25) or hourly yyyy-mm-ddThh yyyy-mm-ddThh within 1 week (e.g. 2022-05-19T10 2022-05-24T22, based on tz).

401.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing

403.description: Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded

500.description: Internal server error or upstream service exception

get.description: Get Google trends Autocomplete data, including topic IDs, for trend discovery and topic expansion.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query to get trending autocomplete suggestions for (e.g., 'artificial').

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

401.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing

403.description: Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded

500.description: Internal server error or upstream service exception

get.description: Get Google shorts Search data, including video metadata and rankings, for short-form content tracking and trend analysis.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query for Google Shorts (e.g., 'cooking tips', 'travel hacks').

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: The result offset to skip a specific number of entries (e.g., set to 12 to skip the first 12 results).

parameters.name: html
parameters.description: Set to true to return the raw HTML of the Google search results page alongside the structured data.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The Google domain to use for the search (e.g., 'google.com', 'google.co.uk'). See Google Domains.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

parameters.name: lr
parameters.description: Restrict results to one or more languages using the 'lang_{language_code}' format (e.g., 'lang_en'). See Google LR Language.

parameters.name: uule
parameters.description: Encoded location string (UULE) used to precisely localize Google search results. This is an advanced/technical parameter — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty and omit it.

parameters.name: tbs
parameters.description: Advanced search filter parameter (tbs) used to apply Google result filters (e.g. time range). This is an advanced parameter — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty.

parameters.name: safe
parameters.description: SafeSearch filter setting. Set to 'active' to filter adult content, or 'off' to disable it.

parameters.name: nfpr
parameters.description: Controls Google's auto-correction. Set to '1' to exclude corrected results, '0' to include them.

401.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing

403.description: Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded

500.description: Internal server error or upstream service exception

parameters.name: shoprs

get.description: Get Google search SERP data, including organic results, ads, and knowledge panels, for keyword tracking and SERP analysis across markets.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query for Google Search (e.g., 'coffee shops', 'how to bake a cake').

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The results page number. Use 0 for the first page, 1 for the second, and so on.

parameters.name: html
parameters.description: Set to true to return the raw HTML of the Google search results page alongside the structured data.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

parameters.name: lr
parameters.description: Restrict results to one or more languages using the 'lang_{language_code}' format (e.g., 'lang_en'). See Google LR Language.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The Google domain to use for the search (e.g., 'google.com', 'google.co.uk'). See Google Domains.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.

parameters.name: cr
parameters.description: Limits results to search results from specific countries. Format: 'countryXX'. See Google CR Countries.

parameters.name: uule
parameters.description: Encoded location string (UULE) used to precisely localize Google search results. This is an advanced/technical parameter — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty and omit it.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: The textual location name (e.g., 'New York, NY') to localize the search results.

parameters.name: ludocid
parameters.description: Google local business CID (place identifier). Used to target a specific Google Business Profile / local listing. Advanced parameter — if you don’t know it, you can omit it.

parameters.name: lsig
parameters.description: Signature parameter (lsig) sometimes required for certain Knowledge Graph / local map view features. This is an advanced technical parameter — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty.

parameters.name: kgmid
parameters.description: Knowledge Graph entity/listing ID (KGMID) used to retrieve details for a specific entity. This is an advanced technical parameter — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty.

parameters.name: si
parameters.description: Cached search context parameter (si) used to reproduce specific Google search result views/context (e.g. some Knowledge Graph tabs). This is an advanced technical parameter — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty.

parameters.name: ibp
parameters.description: Parameter (ibp) used to control certain Google UI expansions or rendering modes (commonly in local/business result views). This is an advanced technical parameter — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty.

parameters.name: uds
parameters.description: Advanced filter token (uds) used for specific Google search sub-filters. This is an advanced technical parameter, usually provided by Google in filter options/results — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty.

parameters.name: tbs
parameters.description: Advanced search filter parameter (tbs) used to apply Google result filters (e.g. time range). This is an advanced parameter — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty.

parameters.name: safe
parameters.description: SafeSearch filter setting. Set to 'active' to filter adult content, or 'off' to disable it.

parameters.name: nfpr
parameters.description: Controls Google's auto-correction. Set to '1' to exclude corrected results, '0' to include them.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Toggle 'Similar Results' and 'Omitted Results' filters. Set to '1' (default) to enable, '0' to disable.

401.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing

403.description: Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded

500.description: Internal server error or upstream service exception

get.description: Get Google scholar Search data, including papers, patents, and legal docs, citation and year filters, and versions and cited-by links, for literature review and academic result monitoring.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The academic search query (e.g., 'machine learning', 'CRISPR gene editing'). Supports advanced operators like 'author:'.

parameters.name: html
parameters.description: Set to true to return the raw HTML of the Google Scholar search page.

parameters.name: cites
parameters.description: Return articles that cite the article with the specified ID.

parameters.name: as_ylo
parameters.description: Minimum publication year filter (e.g., '2020').

parameters.name: as_yhi
parameters.description: Maximum publication year filter (e.g., '2024').

parameters.name: scisbd
parameters.description: Controls whether to return only abstract results (1) or all results (0).

parameters.name: cluster
parameters.description: The unique ID of an article cluster to retrieve all versions of a specific work.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

parameters.name: lr
parameters.description: Restrict results to one or more languages using the 'lang_{language_code}' format (e.g., 'lang_en'). See Google LR Language.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The results page number. Use 0 for the first page, 1 for the second, and so on.

parameters.name: results
parameters.description: The number of search results to return per page.

parameters.name: as_sdt
parameters.description: Advanced filter for specific document types or legal jurisdictions. E.g., '7' to include patents.

parameters.name: safe
parameters.description: SafeSearch filter setting. Set to 'active' to filter adult content, or 'off' to disable it.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Toggle 'Similar Results' and 'Omitted Results' filters. Set to '1' (default) to enable, '0' to disable.

parameters.name: as_vis
parameters.description: Controls whether citations are included in the results: 1 = exclude, 0 (default) = include.

parameters.name: as_rr
parameters.description: Controls whether to show only review articles (topic overviews or discussions of the searched works/authors). Set to 1 to enable the filter, or 0 (default) to return all results.

401.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing

403.description: Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded

500.description: Internal server error or upstream service exception

get.description: Get Google scholar Citations data, including export links, for bibliography automation and citation workflows.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The unique ID of a Google Scholar search result to retrieve citation formats for. Found in the 'id' field of previous Scholar Search responses.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

get.description: Get Google scholar Author data, including publications, citation metrics, and research interests, for researcher analysis and academic profiling.

parameters.name: author_id
parameters.description: The unique Google Scholar ID of the researcher/author (e.g., 'LSs6DR8AAAAJ').

parameters.name: results
parameters.description: The number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

parameters.name: view_op
parameters.description: Specific view operation for the author profile. Use 'list_colleagues' to see co-authors or 'view_citation' for article details.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria for the author's publications. Supported values: 'title', 'pubdate'.

parameters.name: citation_id
parameters.description: The citation ID to view details for (required when 'view_op' is 'view_citation').

401.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing

403.description: Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded

500.description: Internal server error or upstream service exception

get.description: Get Google patent Search data, including filters, for patent discovery and portfolio monitoring.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query for patents (e.g., 'autonomous vehicles', 'blockchain security').

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The results page number. Use 0 for the first page, 1 for the second, and so on.

parameters.name: num
parameters.description: The number of results to return per page (range: 1-100).

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting order for patent results. Supported values: 'new' (Newest), 'old' (Oldest).

parameters.name: clustered
parameters.description: If set to true, results will be grouped by classification.

parameters.name: dups
parameters.description: Deduplication method. Supported values: 'language' (by Publication).

parameters.name: patents
parameters.description: Whether to include Google Patents results.

parameters.name: scholar
parameters.description: Whether to include Google Scholar results.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: Latest date to include. Format: 'type:YYYYMMDD' (e.g., 'publication:20230101').

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Earliest date to include. Format: 'type:YYYYMMDD' (e.g., 'filing:20200101').

parameters.name: inventor
parameters.description: Filter by patent inventor(s). Multiple values can be comma-separated.

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: Filter by patent assignee(s). Multiple values can be comma-separated.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by patent status. Supported values: 'GRANT', 'APPLICATION'.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by patent type. Supported values: 'PATENT', 'DESIGN'.

parameters.name: litigation
parameters.description: Filter by litigation status. Supported values: 'YES', 'NO'.

401.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing

403.description: Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded

500.description: Internal server error or upstream service exception

get.description: Get Google news Search data, including headlines and source metadata, for media monitoring and news aggregation.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query for Google News (e.g., 'artificial intelligence', 'climate change').

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

parameters.name: topic_token
parameters.description: The Google News topic token to retrieve results for a specific category (e.g., 'World', 'Technology'). Obtained from previous responses.

parameters.name: publication_token
parameters.description: The Google News publication token to fetch results from a specific source (e.g., 'CNN', 'BBC'). Obtained from previous responses.

parameters.name: section_token
parameters.description: The Google News section token to access a specific subsection within a topic or publication.

parameters.name: so
parameters.description: Sorting order for news results. Supported values: '0' (Relevance, default), '1' (Date). Only works with 'story_token'.

get.description: Get Google maps Search data, including business listings, ratings and contact data, and coordinate and location targeting, for local market research and lead discovery.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query for Google Maps (e.g., 'restaurants', 'hospitals in New York').

parameters.name: ll
parameters.description: GPS coordinates for the search origin. Format: '@<latitude>,<longitude>,<zoom>'. Required for precise localization and pagination.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The Google domain to use for the search (e.g., 'google.com', 'google.co.uk'). See Google Domains.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Advanced Google Maps data parameter used for certain map/place-specific result filters and views. It can be copied from a Google Maps URL after applying filters, or constructed for specific place searches. This parameter is commonly used when type = "place". If you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty.

parameters.name: place_id
parameters.description: The unique Google Place ID to directly retrieve information for a specific location.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The results pagination offset. Start at 0 and increment by 20 for each subsequent page.

401.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sorting order for reviews. Supported values: 'qualityScore' (Relevance), 'newestFirst' (Newest), 'ratingHigh' (Highest rating), 'ratingLow' (Lowest rating).

parameters.name: topic_id
parameters.description: Filter reviews by a specific topic ID. Topic IDs are obtained from previous Maps Reviews API responses.

parameters.name: next_page_token
parameters.description: Token for retrieving the next page of reviews.

parameters.name: results
parameters.description: The maximum number of reviews to return per page (range: 1-20).

parameters.name: uule

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

parameters.description: The Google domain to use for the search (e.g., 'google.com', 'google.co.uk'). See Google Domains.

parameters.name: ludocid

parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

parameters.name: product
parameters.description: If set to true, the API will specifically look for product matches and shopping results.

parameters.name: visual_matches
parameters.description: If set to true, the API will return visually similar images and matches.

parameters.name: exact_matches
parameters.description: If set to true, the API will search for exact duplicates of the provided image.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

parameters.name: next_page_token
parameters.description: Token for retrieving the next page of job results. Found in 'next_page_token' of a previous response.

parameters.name: chips
parameters.description: Additional search filters (chips) such as job type, date posted, etc. Use values returned in previous responses.

parameters.name: lrad
parameters.description: Search radius in miles around the specified location.

parameters.name: ltype
parameters.description: Filter by job location type. Set to '1' for work-from-home (remote) jobs.

parameters.name: uds
parameters.description: Advanced Google-provided filter string for job results.

parameters.name: page_token
parameters.description: The unique token used to retrieve detailed product information in Google's immersive view. This token is typically found in Google Shopping or Search results.

parameters.name: stores
parameters.description: If set to true, the API will retrieve a list of more sellers for the product. Use this together with the 'sori' parameter.

parameters.name: sori
parameters.description: Pagination offset for seller results. Set this to the number of sellers already retrieved to get the next set.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.

parameters.name: language

get.description: Get Google images Search data, including image URLs and metadata, for filtered image discovery for research and monitoring workflows.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search query for images (e.g., 'mountain landscape', 'luxury cars').

parameters.name: html
parameters.description: Set to true to return the raw HTML of the Google search results page alongside the structured data.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The results page number. Use 0 for the first page, 1 for the second, and so on.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The Google domain to use for the search (e.g., 'google.com', 'google.co.uk'). See Google Domains.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.

parameters.name: cr
parameters.description: Limits results to search results from specific countries. Format: 'countryXX'. See Google CR Countries.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

parameters.name: lr
parameters.description: Restrict results to one or more languages using the 'lang_{language_code}' format (e.g., 'lang_en'). See Google LR Language.

parameters.name: uule
parameters.description: Encoded location string (UULE) used to precisely localize Google search results. This is an advanced/technical parameter — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty and omit it.

parameters.name: period_unit
parameters.description: Time unit for 'recent' image results. Supported values: 's' (Second), 'n' (Minute), 'h' (Hour), 'd' (Day), 'w' (Week), 'm' (Month), 'y' (Year).

parameters.name: period_value
parameters.description: Time duration value used with 'period_unit' (e.g., 15 for 15 days). Default: 1.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date for restricting images to a time range. Format: 'YYYYMMDD' (e.g., '20241201').

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date for restricting images to a time range. Format: 'YYYYMMDD' (e.g., '20241231').

parameters.name: chips
parameters.description: Additional suggested search terms (chips) to filter images. Values are obtained from previous responses.

parameters.name: tbs
parameters.description: Advanced search filter parameter (tbs) used to apply Google result filters (e.g. time range). This is an advanced parameter — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty.

parameters.name: imgar
parameters.description: Filter by image aspect ratio. Supported values: 's' (Square), 't' (Tall), 'w' (Wide), 'xw' (Panoramic).

parameters.name: imgsz
parameters.description: Filter by image size. Supported values: 'l' (Large), 'm' (Medium), 'i' (Icon), and specific resolutions like '4mp', '10mp'.

parameters.name: image_color
parameters.description: Filter images by a dominant color (e.g., 'red', 'blue', 'bw' for black and white, 'trans' for transparent).

parameters.name: image_type
parameters.description: Filter by image type. Supported values: 'face', 'photo', 'clipart', 'lineart', 'animated'.

parameters.name: licenses
parameters.description: Filter by usage rights and licenses. Supported values: 'f' (Free to use), 'fc' (Commercial use), 'cl' (Creative Commons).

parameters.name: safe
parameters.description: SafeSearch filter setting. Set to 'active' to filter adult content, or 'off' to disable it.

parameters.name: nfpr
parameters.description: Controls Google's auto-correction. Set to '1' to exclude corrected results, '0' to include them.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Toggle 'Similar Results' and 'Omitted Results' filters. Set to '1' (default) to enable, '0' to disable.

403.description: Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded

500.description: Internal server error or upstream service exception

get.description: Get Google hotels Search data, including prices, ratings, and availability details, for travel comparison and hospitality market analysis.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The destination or specific hotel name you are searching for (e.g., 'Paris', 'Hilton New York').

parameters.name: check_in_date
parameters.description: The hotel check-in date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format (e.g., '2026-05-20').

parameters.name: check_out_date
parameters.description: The hotel check-out date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format (e.g., '2026-05-25').

parameters.name: next_page_token
parameters.description: The token used to retrieve the next page of hotel results. This token is found in the 'next_page_token' field of a previous response.

parameters.name: adults
parameters.description: The number of adults staying in the room.

parameters.name: children
parameters.description: The number of children staying in the room.

parameters.name: children_ages
parameters.description: The ages of the children, separated by commas (e.g., '5,10'). The number of ages must match the 'children' parameter.

parameters.name: html
parameters.description: Set to true to return the raw HTML of the Google search results page alongside the structured data.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: The three-letter ISO currency code for displaying prices (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR'). See Google Hotels Currency.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: The criteria to sort hotel results. Supported values: '3' (Lowest price), '8' (Highest rating), '13' (Most reviews).

parameters.name: min_price
parameters.description: Minimum price filter for the hotel stay.

parameters.name: max_price
parameters.description: Maximum price filter for the hotel stay.

parameters.name: property_types
parameters.description: Filter by hotel property types. See the Google Property Types for the full list of supported hotel property types. For vacation rentals, refer to the Google Hotels Vacation Rentals Property Types.

parameters.name: amenities
parameters.description: Filter by specific amenities (e.g., '35' for free Wi-Fi). Google Hotels Amenities (hotel amenities). Google Hotels Vacation Rentals Amenities (vacation rental amenities)

parameters.name: rating
parameters.description: Filter by minimum guest rating. Supported values: '7' (3.5+), '8' (4.0+), '9' (4.5+).

parameters.name: brands
parameters.description: Filter by specific hotel brand IDs. IDs can be comma-separated.

parameters.name: hotel_class
parameters.description: Filter by hotel star ratings. Supported values: '2', '3', '4', '5'. Can be comma-separated.

parameters.name: free_cancellation
parameters.description: Filter for hotels that offer free cancellation. Set to '1' or 'true' to enable.

parameters.name: special_offers
parameters.description: Filter for hotels currently offering special deals or discounts. Set to '1' or 'true' to enable.

parameters.name: eco_certified
parameters.description: Filter for hotels that are eco-certified. Set to '1' or 'true' to enable.

parameters.name: vacation_rentals
parameters.description: Set to true to search for vacation rentals instead of standard hotels.

parameters.name: bedrooms
parameters.description: Minimum number of bedrooms required (applies to vacation rentals).

parameters.name: bathrooms
parameters.description: Minimum number of bathrooms required (applies to vacation rentals).

parameters.name: property_token
parameters.description: The unique token for a specific hotel property to fetch detailed information.
